claim: Skills (reusable prompts/workflows) should be created for anything done more than once to avoid repetition and enable automation
actionable: Extract any repeated prompt or workflow into a skill that can be invoked with a slash command
source_title: You NEED to know these vibe coding secrets

claim: Automations allow you to automatically trigger agent prompts based on GitHub events (PR opened, merge, etc.) with conditional waiting
actionable: Set up automations that trigger on GitHub events and use natural language conditions like 'wait until you see X comment'
source_title: You NEED to know these vibe coding secrets

claim: Loops are processes that run indefinitely until a goal is met, consisting of a trigger, repeated action, and termination goal
actionable: Define loops with clear triggers (time-based, event-based), actions (code review, optimization, etc.), and completion goals
source_title: You NEED to know these vibe coding secrets

claim: Cloud agents provide infinite parallelism because they run in isolated cloud environments, avoiding local CPU/RAM constraints
actionable: Use cloud agents when you need to run 10+ parallel agents without degrading local machine performance
source_title: You NEED to know these vibe coding secrets

claim: Cloud agents don't always have the latest features - local agents typically ship with new features first, then cloud agents follow
actionable: Monitor release notes carefully and use local agents when you need cutting-edge features immediately
source_title: You NEED to know these vibe coding secrets

claim: Work trees (separate repository clones) prevent conflicts when multiple agents write to the same codebase simultaneously
actionable: Create a new work tree for each agent to enable parallel development and resolve conflicts during merge phase
source_title: You NEED to know these vibe coding secrets

claim: Multi-model workflows (planning with frontier model, implementation with fast model, review with different model) reduce costs without sacrificing quality
actionable: Assign different models to different stages: planning (Fable), implementation (Composer), review (GPT-4) based on task requirements
source_title: You NEED to know these vibe coding secrets

claim: Merging and deployment with multiple parallel agents creates conflicts and delays because agents have to rebase and re-test on each merge
actionable: Batch multiple agent PRs together and use a single agent to merge and deploy all changes at once to avoid cascading rebases
source_title: You NEED to know these vibe coding secrets

claim: 100% test coverage and comprehensive logging are maintainable at scale with agent automation, enabling agents to fix errors automatically overnight
actionable: Set up loops that check test coverage nightly, add missing tests, log all production errors, and have agents fix logged errors
source_title: You NEED to know these vibe coding secrets
